textByHash.0e62454ce98e421f2557c39c499958cad31ce5e6: You don't have space for that.
textByHash.1d8782cdeb24ba38eee5b9f013b426431e46d049: Well, I have some rather nice things I've found. I collect fossils, infact you might say I'm obsessed with them. Large or small, but especially the small numulites.
textByHash.35a6fa5843341ab8e09f2ee915474c33443b032b: What fossils would you like to trade?
textByHash.52349465b54e32c03c2f16a359e9afbdb6c59be5: All done. Would you like to trade in any more fossils?
textByHash.607ebd217a073fabb40830677c6103af9a05d15b: Of course, you left it here and I kept it for you.
textByHash.77958c843f0593a5d8e3190d5cfe1671e2cf28b2: I'm Mary. In the tent you'll find Tray, my dog. He's quite friendly and doesn't bite. I'm here for the fossils. I'll go anywhere for fossils!
textByHash.7b1848da495ebb8b71ef3b4cdfacd77237ae1f8e: Hello there. Do you have any fossils for me?
textByHash.9540cd0aa67ec1da54a099542471f902c948d71e: It looks like you don't have any fossils to trade.
